title: [FIRRTL] IMDCE: not removing all dead instances

features.name: dead hierarchical instance with unused output
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where the instantiated module itself contains sub-instances (hierarchical), and the top-level instance's output port is entirely unused, making the instance a dead code candidate for elimination

features.name: mixed-liveness instances of same module
features.description: Code should include two instances of the same module where one instance has its output connected to a used signal and the other instance's output is unconnected, creating a mixed-liveness scenario for dead code elimination

features.name: dead leaf instance versus dead hierarchical instance elimination
features.description: Code should include two dead instances — one of a leaf module (no sub-instances) and one of a hierarchical module (contains sub-instances) — both with unused outputs, to expose differential behavior in dead-instance elimination
